mapper.sql: t.id, t.snapshot_id, t.order_id, t.sale_model_code, t.sale_model_name, t.configuration_code, t.configuration_name, t.carline_code, t.model_code, t.variant_code, t.option_codes, t.option_price_breakdown, t.sale_policy_snapshot, t.model_policy_snapshot, t.variant_policy_snapshot, t.config_policy_snapshot, t.snapshot_version, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_vehicle_snapshot ( snapshot_id, order_id, sale_model_code, sale_model_name, configuration_code, configuration_name, carline_code, model_code, variant_code, option_codes, option_price_breakdown, sale_policy_snapshot, model_policy_snapshot, variant_policy_snapshot, config_policy_snapshot, snapshot_version, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{snapshotId}, #{orderId}, #{saleModelCode}, #{saleModelName}, #{configurationCode}, #{configurationName}, #{carlineCode}, #{modelCode}, #{variantCode}, #{optionCodes}, #{optionPriceBreakdown}, #{salePolicySnapshot}, #{modelPolicySnapshot}, #{variantPolicySnapshot}, #{configPolicySnapshot}, #{snapshotVersion}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_vehicle_snapshot ( snapshot_id, order_id, sale_model_code, sale_model_name, configuration_code, configuration_name, carline_code, model_code, variant_code, option_codes, option_price_breakdown, sale_policy_snapshot, model_policy_snapshot, variant_policy_snapshot, config_policy_snapshot, snapshot_version, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.snapshotId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.saleModelCode}, #{item.saleModelName}, #{item.configurationCode}, #{item.configurationName}, #{item.carlineCode}, #{item.modelCode}, #{item.variantCode}, #{item.optionCodes}, #{item.optionPriceBreakdown}, #{item.salePolicySnapshot}, #{item.modelPolicySnapshot}, #{item.variantPolicySnapshot}, #{item.configPolicySnapshot}, #{item.snapshotVersion}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t SET
t.snapshot_version = #{snapshotVersion},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
UPDATE vso_order_vehicle_snapshot t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
